notifications.title: Kind Attention to the Institutions: - Review Results of Nov./Dec. 2025 Examinations are Published
Kind Attention to the Institution :- The results of the April/May 2026 final semester UG (B.E. / B.Tech.) project work is published.
Kind Attention to the Institution: - WEB PORTAL IS OPENED FOR HALL TICKET AND ATTENDANCE SHEET (FOR ELIGIBLE REGISTERED CANDIDATES  AND FEES PAID COLLEGES ONLY) FOR APRIL/ MAY 2026 EXAMINATIONS.

Distance Education:- Candidates are requested to approach the respective Study Centre for Collecting Hall Ticket for February / March 2026 Examinations .Students who have already made a request for  Change of Exam Centre may contact 044-22357300/044-22357248.

Fees Abstract for April/May 2026 Examinations  is available in the File Inbox (NEW SERVER  https://coe.annauniv.edu/home/index.php ). Institutions are instructed to download.Last date for fees payment will be 14-05-2026 5 pm.
Distance Education - The M.B.A / M.C.A / M.Sc – February / March 2026 Examinations scheduled on 24-05-2026 have been rescheduled to 09-06-2026.
